_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: Some histologically confirmed meningiomas were not identified by MRI (4/16; 25%). They corresponded to very small tumors in two cases and to completely calcified meningiomas in two other cases
details: Failed to detect 25% (4/16) of histologically confirmed meningiomas - corresponding to very small tumors (2 cases) and completely calcified meningiomas (2 cases)
